mapper.sql: SELECT a.tableproject, a.lastDate, a.TABLETYPE, a.tableNameEN, a.tableNameZH, a.LIFECYCLE, a.TABLEALLCOUNT, a.TABLESIZE, a.tableusecount, a.tableUseCountOfDay, a.tableUseCountOfWeek, a.tableUseCountOfMonth FROM ( SELECT s.tableproject, s.PARTITIONDATE AS lastDate, s.TABLETYPE, s.tableproject || '.' || s.TABLENAME AS tableNameEN, s.TABLECOMMENT AS tableNameZH, s.LIFECYCLE, s.TABLEALLCOUNT, s.TABLESIZE, u.tableUseCountOfDay, u.tableUseCountOfWeek, u.tableUseCountOfMonth, u.tableUseCount FROM SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL s LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t0.tablename, t0.project, t3.tableUseCountOfMonth, t2.tableUseCountOfWeek, t1.tableUseCountOfDay, t0.tableUseCount FROM ( SELECT SUM(table_Use_Count) AS tableUseCount, tablename, project FROM DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t GROUP BY tablename, project ) t0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(table_Use_Count) AS tableUseCountOfMonth, tablename, project FROM DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t WHERE dt BETWEEN to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '31 days', 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY tablename, project ) t3 ON (t0.tablename = t3.tablename AND t0.project = t3.project) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(table_Use_Count) AS tableUseCountOfWeek, tablename, project FROM DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t WHERE dt BETWEEN to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days', 'yyyy-MM-dd') AND to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY tablename, project ) t2 ON (t0.tablename = t2.tablename AND t0.project = t2.project) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM(table_Use_Count) AS tableUseCountOfDay, tablename, project FROM DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT t WHERE dt = to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'yyyy-MM-dd') GROUP BY tablename, project ) t1 ON (t0.tablename = t1.tablename AND t0.project = t1.project) ) u ON (UPPER(u.tablename) = UPPER(s.tablename) AND UPPER(s.tableproject) = UPPER(u.project)) ) a WHERE lastDate = to_char(CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day', 'yyyyMMdd');
mapper.select:
select sum(table_use_count) from
select sum(table_use_count) as table_use_count from DP_UT_ODPSSQLCOUNT where tablename = #{key} and project = #{map[${key}]}

select b.partitiondate,a.tablename as tableNameEN,a.tabletype,a.TABLECREATEDTIME,a.TABLELASTMETAMODIFIEDTIME,a.PARTITIONCOUNT,a.TABLELASTDATAMODIFIEDTIME,a.tableProject,a.tableSize from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a right join (select a.tablename,max(a.partitiondate) as partitiondate from SYNLTE.SYNDMG_TABLE_ALL a group by a.tablename) b on (a.tablename=b.tablename and a.partitiondate = b.partitiondate)
